languages.original_text: "Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."

languages.text: "О нет, эти вещи не мертвы. Каждая из них окружена слабыми отголосками цветов, как своих собственных, так и привнесенных кем-то... кто был до. Все они несут в себе истории, частью которых являются, и все они были дороги кому-то, не сейчас и не здесь".

"Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."

"Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."

languages.text: 「ちょっと違いますわ。これらのものは死んでいいません。それぞれが、自分の色と、ここにいた誰かが持ってきた色、そのかすかな残像に囲まれています。それぞれが、その一部である物語を運び、誰かに愛されていました。今はもう、ここにはいません。」
languages.original_text: "Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、だめだ、これらのものは死んでいない。それぞれが、自分の色と、ここにいた誰かが持ってきた色、そのかすかな残像に囲まれている。それぞれが、その一部である物語を運び、誰かに愛されていた。今はもう、ここにはいない。」

languages.text: « Oh non, ces choses ne sont pas mortes. Chacune est enveloppée de légers échos de couleurs, aussi bien les leurs que celles apportées par quelqu'un... qui était ici auparavant. Elles renferment toutes des histoires dont elles font partie et elles étaient toutes chères à quelqu'un, ailleurs et à un autre moment. »
languages.original_text: "Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."

traits.locale_text: « Oh non, ces choses ne sont pas mortes. Chacune est enveloppée de légers échos de couleurs, aussi bien les leurs que celles apportées par quelqu'un... qui était ici auparavant. Elles renferment toutes des histoires dont elles font partie et elles étaient toutes chères à quelqu'un, ailleurs et à un autre moment. »

languages.text: "Oh, nein. Diese Dinge sind nicht tot. Jedes von ihnen ist von schwachen Echos aus Farben umgeben, ihren eigenen und den Farben von jemandem ... der bereits hier war. Sie haben allesamt Geschichten, deren Teil sie sind, und sie lagen alle jemandem am Herzen. Allerdings nicht hier und jetzt."
languages.original_text: "Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, nein. Diese Dinge sind nicht tot. Jedes von ihnen ist von schwachen Echos aus Farben umgeben, ihren eigenen und den Farben von jemandem ... der bereits hier war. Sie haben allesamt Geschichten, deren Teil sie sind, und sie lagen alle jemandem am Herzen. Allerdings nicht hier und jetzt."

languages.text: "Hayır, bu şeyler ölü değil. Her biri, hem kendilerinin hem de... Daha önce burada olan birinin getirdiği soluk renk yankılarıyla çevrili. Hepsi bir parçası oldukları hikâyeleri taşıyorlar ve bir zamanlar hepsi, şimdi ve burada olmayan biri için değerliydi."
languages.original_text: "Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır, bu şeyler ölü değil. Her biri, hem kendilerinin hem de... Daha önce burada olan birinin getirdiği soluk renk yankılarıyla çevrili. Hepsi bir parçası oldukları hikâyeleri taşıyorlar ve bir zamanlar hepsi, şimdi ve burada olmayan biri için değerliydi."

languages.text: «Oh, no, estas cosas no están muertas. Cada una de ellas está envuelta en un tenue eco de colores, tanto los suyos como los aportados por alguien... que ha estado aquí antes. Narran historias de las que también forman parte, y todas fueron valiosas para alguien, solo que no ahora, y no aquí».
languages.original_text: "Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."

traits.locale_text: «Oh, no, estas cosas no están muertas. Cada una de ellas está envuelta en un tenue eco de colores, tanto los suyos como los aportados por alguien... que ha estado aquí antes. Narran historias de las que también forman parte, y todas fueron valiosas para alguien, solo que no ahora, y no aquí».

languages.text: “不，这些东西并非死物。每一件都萦绕着微弱的色彩余韵——既有它本身的色泽，也有那些曾在此驻足之人带来的印记。它们各自承载着一段属于自身的故事，也曾被某人视作至宝，只是如今早已物是人非。”
languages.original_text: "Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."
